content.query:
Create View EDW.V_LP_Emp_PlanItems as
Select P.ProjectId, P.ParentId, P.ProjectName,P.InstallerId,
PL.PlanitemId, PL.PlanItemName,Datebegin,DateEnd,RecordId,RecordType,PL.Color,PL.ProductionBranchId,
H.EmployeeId_LP_Ref, H.Division, H.Firstname, H.Lastname, H.Jobtitledescription, H.workemail,H.terminationdate, H.positionstatus
from EDW.DIM_Projects P 
Left join EDW.DIM_PlanItem PL on P.Projectid=PL.ProjectId
Left join EDW.DIM_Installer I on P.InstallerId=I.InstallerId
Left join EDW.DIM_HR_EMployee H on H.EMployeeId_LP_Ref=I.EmployeeId
where P.Division='MAC' and H.Terminationdate is null -- and H.positionstatus = 'Active'
and  H.Jobtitledescription = 'Measure Tech';
